redaction_note: Synthetic compact fixture for near-threshold judge calibration.
summary: Fourth near-threshold fixture keeps the batch below automatic LLM review strength.
setpoint: surface optional critique value without spending an automatic LLM call

turns.speaker: fixture-policy
turns.text: Do not turn public Farcaster reply pressure into production changes without approval.

turns.speaker: fixture-skill
turns.text: A reusable workflow template should run validate, preflight, simulate, and verify.

turns.speaker: fixture-case
turns.text: Repeated timeout failure error retry should stay as case evidence.

turns.speaker: fixture-memory
turns.text: Stable project facts cover local repo, VPS, GitHub, window, and distill context.
